channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: S&P 500, Nasdaq, Dow Drop As US-Iran War Jitters, Inflation Risk Spur Tech Selloffs — SMCI, AMZN, OPEN, SEGG, TSLA In Focus
item.description: President Donald Trump threatened to strike Iran again after negotiations were taking “too long.”

item.title: On Tesla Becoming X
SpaceX: Why This $1.6 Trillion Opportunity Is Critical for the Upcoming IPO
item.description: Recent filings clarify SpaceX's biggest growth opportunities.

item.title: Here's Why Tesla (TSLA) Fell More Than Broader Market
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) closed at $381.89 in the latest trading session, marking a -3.73% move from the prior day.

item.title: TSLA Stock Watches SpaceX IPO While Cheapest Cybertruck Hits Driveways After Long Wait
item.description: Multiple social media users confirmed they received their vehicles in the past few days.

item.title: Everyone wants a piece of Tesla’s battery business
item.description: Electricity demand from AI data centers is pushing everyone — including automakers like GM and Ford — into the energy storage business.

item.title: Tesla Slips as BYD Raises Global Ambitions
item.description: BYD wants to become the world's largest automaker by volume within five years.

item.title: Tesla stuns with another FSD approval in Europe, its second in two days
item.description: Tesla has stunned by gaining yet another approval for its Full Self-Driving suite in Europe, its second in two days and its fifth overall. Belgium will be the latest country to allow Tesla owners to utilize FSD on public roads in Europe, joining a quickly growing list that started with the Nether...

item.title: Tesla Stock Surges Into Bull Case as JPMorgan Lifts Target 227%
item.description: Tesla Gets Major Boost as JPMorgan Expands Growth Story Beyond EVs

item.title: Elon Musk Breaks Down What Goes Into An AI Satellite And Why It Is 'Easier' To Design Ahead Of Mega SpaceX IPO: 'A Lot Of Solar Cells, A Radiator...'
item.description: Elon Musk unveiled a more detailed look at an early version of an AI data-center satellite that SpaceX plans to build, offering new insight into one of the most ambitious projects underpinning the company's expected record initial public offering. Musk...

item.title: Summon for CT is rolling out soon!
item.description: Tesla made the official announcement on their instagram. submitted by /u/lavoid12 [link] [comments]

item.title: The Massive SpaceX IPO Is Almost Here. We've Got the Basics for Investors
item.description: If your crowd likes to talk stocks, chances are the group chat has been busy lately: The SpaceX IPO might be the hottest topic with retail investors since shares of Nvidia began their rocket ride to a $5 trillion market cap.

item.title: Model Y Standard in some EU markets has blue exterior paint as an option
item.description: Not sure if someone else has posted this but some markets like Ireland and France in Europe can order a model Y standard with Blue Exterior paint. A US YouTuber who did an early review on the Standard said their initial plan was to offer it with blue as an option but they decided against it befor...

item.title: 2 Stocks That Could Soar from SpaceX's $26.5 Trillion Artificial Intelligence (AI) Empire
item.description: As SpaceX pursues its grand goals, both Tesla and Nvidia are positioned to benefit.

item.title: FSD approved in Belgium!
item.description: https://x.com/AnnickDeRidder/status/2064758257558650891 ​ FSD is taking over Europe, piece by piece. Finally! submitted by /u/ctfTijG [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla gets go-ahead to sell self-driving technology in Belgium
item.description: Tesla Full Self-Driving supervised driver ‌assistance software has been ‌authorised in Belgium, Annick De Ridder, ​the transport minister of Flanders region said on Wednesday in a post on X. The approval ​allows Tesla ​to roll ‌out its technology after the company successfully carried out a serie...

item.title: Tesla Apparently Won't Let Cybertruck Buyers Transfer FSD Without Spending Another $20k
item.description: Buyers of Tesla's cheapest Cybertruck trim ordered with the intention of transferring FSD—now they can't.

item.title: 3 Reasons Tesla Stock Is So Volatile This Week
item.description: Tesla stock was lower early Wednesday after a flare-up in tensions in the Middle East, leaving investors nervous. Shares of the electric-vehicle maker were down 2.7% at $386.11 in midday trading, while the and were down 0.8% and 1.1%, respectively. President Donald Trump said the U.S.

item.title: BYD is deploying 2.4x more charging power per month than Tesla
item.description: BYD is building a charging network that makes Tesla’s Supercharger look slow — and it’s deploying it at a pace that could see it surpass Tesla’s global network within two to three years. The Chinese automaker has already deployed over 5,700 Flash Charging stations in China in just a few months an...

item.title: Tesla: The Future Looks Bright, The Stock Does Not
SpaceX’s Elon Musk relieves worries about orbital data centers
item.description: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk recently confronted worries about orbital data centers and launching satellites in mass quantities in space, as some voiced concerns about crowding. Musk’s SpaceX plans to combat the issue of needing data centers by launching them into space instead of taking up valuable real...

item.title: SpaceX IPO Faces Last-Minute Challenge From US Senator Elizabeth Warren
item.description: Elizabeth Warren urged the SEC to delay the SpaceX IPO, but $150 billion in demand keeps Friday's Nasdaq debut on track.

item.title: Tesla Full Self-Driving hits Level 4? One analyst says yes
item.description: Tesla Full Self-Driving (Supervised) is currently listed as a Level 2 suite in terms of its passenger cars. As its Robotaxi platform continues to move quickly, it has been recognized as a Level 4 ride-sharing program by the State of Texas, as Tesla recently self-certified itself . However, a Wall...

item.title: Tesla Stock: FSD Approved In Denmark; Elon Musk Says This About AI Chips
item.description: Tesla is designing a new iteration of AI chips that will be used for self-driving cars and humanoid robots. The stock is down about 2.5% today.

item.title: This Tesla Model 3 Went Nearly 400 Miles In A Range Test, 30 More Than Its EPA Rating
item.description: Edmunds’ latest range test shows the rear-wheel-drive Model 3 easily beating its official range and showing remarkable efficiency.

item.title: Tesla Challenger XPeng’s CEO Takes Over Robotics Division After Key Executive Departure – XPEV Slides For Sixth Straight Session
item.description: According to a Reuters report, CEO He Xiaopeng will take over leadership of XPeng's robotics division immediately as the company moves toward starting mass production of its humanoid robots by the end of the year.

item.title: What Drove Tesla China's 22.5% Y/Y Sales Growth in May?
item.description: TSLA's China sales rebound in May, with retail deliveries up 22.5% Y/Y and exports surging from its Shanghai plant.

item.title: Tesla Cybertruck is finally getting Summon
item.description: Tesla has finally and officially confirmed that Actually Smart Summon, commonly known as ASS, will make its way to the Cybertruck two and a half years after first deliveries. The feature, which is part of the Full Self-Driving suite, allows owners of any Tesla to literally summon their vehicle to...

item.title: Forget Tesla: This Magnificent 7 Stock This Wins Every Time
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) is dominating every feed again after a wild week of robotaxi chatter, SpaceX merger speculation, and a sharp 10.28% one-week slide that bulls are framing as a buying opportunity. But here is what you should actually be watching. The Tesla Trade Is Pricing Perfection Into a Dec...

item.title: Tesla Has 'Effectively' Achieved Level 4 Autonomy, Says Piper Sandler Analyst – How A Trip To Minneapolis Strengthened His Conviction
item.description: Piper Sandler has an ‘Overweight’ rating on TSLA stock with a $500 price target, implying an upside potential of nearly 25% from Tuesday’s closing price.

item.title: Trump Administration Labels Tesla Rival Nio A Chinese Military Company—EV Maker Says 'Not Justified'
item.description: Chinese automaker NIO Inc. has pushed back against the President Donald Trump administration’s move to declare the Tesla Inc. rival a Chinese military company.

item.title: Has Tesla solved the self-driving puzzle? This analyst thinks so
item.description: Investing.com -- In a note to clients on Wednesday, Piper Sandler analyst Alexander Potter argued that Tesla has effectively achieved Level 4 autonomy in most conditions, laying out six reasons why he believes the company has solved the self-driving puzzle despite persistent skepticism from clien...

item.title: SpaceX IPO Set to Test Strength of the ‘Elon Premium’ as Valuation Nears $1.8 Trillion
item.description: SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX) is preparing for one of the most closely watched stock market debuts in recent history, with its upcoming listing expected to provide a major test of the so-called “Elon premium” that has helped propel Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) to among the highest valuations in the U. S.

item.title: Scott Galloway Says Tesla, Nvidia, Broadcom Could Get Caught In The Crossfire Of The Space X IPO
item.description: NYU professor Scott Galloway warns a wave of upcoming AI IPOs could trigger an 80% collapse for one new market debut, and the aftershocks may hit already-public AI names like Nvidia Corp and Tesla Inc. The Prof G Markets co-host...

item.title: Opinion: SpaceX Stock Will Initially Soar, but Its Smoke-and-Mirror Optics Won't Last Beyond 2 Months
item.description: The SpaceX rug pull is coming, and retail investors will be left holding the bag.

item.title: RIVN Stock Slides Overnight: Rivian's 'Affordable' R2 Draws Backlash – Buyers Question Value Against Tesla Model Y
item.description: Buyers compared the R2 unfavorably to Tesla's Model Y and Rivian's own R1S.

item.title: ProShares Plans 2x SpaceX ETF Launch on Day of Record IPO
item.description: ProShares will launch SPCF, a 2x daily SpaceX ETF, on June 12 as the record IPO draws $250 billion in demand.

item.title: TSLA Stock Hits 1-Month Low Amid SpaceX Merger Jitters — But Analyst Sees Tesla Holders Getting 66% Of Deal Within A Year
item.description: Analysts also flagged risks, including shareholder opposition and regulatory scrutiny from Tesla's China exposure.

item.title: Elon Musk, after DOGE and politics, bets on SpaceX IPO
item.description: Elon Musk has become the most powerful, prolific and bewildering human on earth and is about to become the world's first trillionaire if his latest brainchild -- the IPO of his rocket and AI company SpaceX -- goes as planned.Without Musk, OpenAI would go on to become the dominant AI giant, and th...

item.title: GM Follows Tesla’s Playbook — Expands Into Energy Storage With Peak Partnership
item.description: GM partnered with Peak Energy to develop and exclusively manufacture sodium-ion cells in Michigan.

item.title: New Tesla Purchase? Even the Base Level Model Y Is Incredible!
item.description: In 2024, the Tesla Model Y was the most sold automobile in the world. In 2025, it was a close second. It sold more than the Ford F-Series, Toyota RAV4, Honda CR-V, and BYD Song.

item.title: Tesla's China Sales Just Snapped a 2-Month Slump With a 22% Jump. Is the Turnaround Real?
item.description: A refreshed lineup and aggressive financing may have helped drive a sharp rebound in the EV maker's May retail sales in China. But the year-to-date trend is still pointing down.

item.title: Rob Arnott: Will SpaceX Create The Biggest Bubble Ever?
item.description: The SpaceX IPO is almost here and will bring significant change with it for retail and institutional investors alike. Research Affiliate’s Rob Arnott offers his thoughts on the impact of SpaceX on passive portfolios, the bubble it will likely create, and ways advisors and investors can navigate t...

item.title: The SpaceX IPO Is Days Away. Here's How to Prepare.
item.description: SpaceX is hoping to raise $75 billion at a $1.77 trillion valuation.

item.title: Tesla Full Self-Driving is taking over Europe: fourth country gets FSD approval
item.description: Tesla has secured regulatory approval for its Full Self-Driving (Supervised) system in Denmark, marking a significant step in the technology’s expansion across Europe. Announced on June 9 , the approval positions Denmark as the fourth European country to greenlight FSD Supervised, following the N...

item.title: New Tesla Building in Camarillo, CA.
item.description: Located on the south end of Pancho Rd. submitted by /u/websponger [link] [comments]

item.title: Why Elon Musk's track record of unfilled promises matters for investors
item.description: As Tesla (TSLA) CEO Elon Musk prepares to expand his corporate empire through SpaceX's IPO this Friday, June 12, should his promises and vision be met with a healthy dose of skepticism by investors? New York Times investigative business reporter Kirsten Grind — who contributed to the latest artic...

item.title: 5 Reasons SpaceX and Tesla Will Merge
item.description: The two companies run by Elon Musk are getting increasingly interrelated.

item.title: Elon Musk Says He’s Building a Chip “2 to 3 Times” Better Than NVIDIA at 10% The Cost. Is He Bluffing?
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) CEO Elon Musk dropped a striking claim during a recent conversation with Baron Capital founder Ron Baron, circulated widely after being posted to X by @carm1nee. Musk said he is building a chip that will be “two to three times better than NVIDIA” at 10% of the cost, with a spe...
